compiled_state.title: RED: Test debug-everything interactivity question and non-interactive deferral
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Write tests verifying debug-everything SKILL.md contains an interactivity question at session start and non-interactive deferral behavior.

**File**: `tests/scripts/test-debug-everything-interactivity.sh`

**6 test functions**:
1. `test_interactivity_question_at_session_start` — SKILL.md documents asking whether session is interactive at startup (Phase 1 area). RED: no such question exists.
2. `test_non_interactive_defers_user_input_items` — When non-interactive, items requiring user input are deferred rather than blocking. RED: no non-interactive mode exists.
3. `test_deferred_items_get_classification_comment` — Deferred bugs get a classification comment noting which gate flagged them. RED: no deferral mechanism.
4. `test_interactivity_gates_safeguard_approval` — Non-interactive mode auto-defers Phase 2.6 safeguard bugs instead of presenting proposals for approval. RED: Phase 2.6 has no interactivity conditional.
5. `test_interactivity_gates_complex_escalation` — Non-interactive mode logs COMPLEX_ESCALATION as ticket comment instead of blocking for user input. RED: COMPLEX_ESCALATION has no interactivity conditional.
6. `test_interactivity_flag_propagates_to_fix_bug` ��� The interactivity flag is propagated to fix-bug invocations so fix-bug can defer its own interaction points. RED: no flag propagation documented.

**Structural test exemption**: Metadata/schema validation of prompt file.

**Also register** in `.test-index` on line 86 (debug-everything/SKILL.md entry).

### Files to modify
- CREATE: `tests/scripts/test-debug-everything-interactivity.sh`
- EDIT: `.test-index` (append to debug-everything/SKILL.md entry)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-debug-everything-interactivity.sh
- [ ] At least 6 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_\|--- test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-debug-everything-interactivity.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] .test-index updated
  Verify: grep 'debug-everything/SKILL.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test-debug-everything-interactivity.sh'

comments.body: AC amendment: Increase test count to cover all 5 interaction gates (Phase 2.6 safeguard, Phase 6 Step 1a file-overlap, Phase 6 Step 1b oscillation, Phase 9 escalated bugs, COMPLEX_ESCALATION) plus the question + deferral behavior + propagation. Consider 8+ tests instead of 6.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: 8 RED tests for interactivity question + deferral across 5 gates.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
